name: Earthy Handmade
tagline: Warm tactile deck with paper texture, organic cards, sticker labels, and handmade workshop pacing.

palette.description: Warm paper, sage green, terracotta, golden ochre, and ink-green text with tactile cards and soft organic shapes.

typography.style: Soft serif display with rounded body text for a handcrafted feel.

best_for: Brand manifestos, workshops, classroom kickoffs, nonprofit storytelling, and community or creative decks that should feel human and tactile.
avoid_for: Formal investor reports, technical architecture reviews, or high-stakes executive materials.

source_inspiration.name: Earthy Handmade Slides for Creative Brands
source_inspiration.notes: Original HTML template rebuilt from public visual direction only; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
